description: Evaluates upgrade and patch management service maturity—unified enterprise and supply-chain processes, KPIs/KRIs, orchestration for network/endpoint/application systems, policies, dedicated teams, SOC logging, and AI-assisted patch prioritization.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: An upgrade and patch management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Service for applications, devices, and systems

capabilities.name: Unified patch management process (enterprise and supply chain)
capabilities.description: An asset-neutral upgrade and patch management process covers enterprise assets and third-party supply chain components, is automated, and is reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Third-party and supply chain patch process
Scope of third parties and vendors

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Upgrade and patch KPIs and KRIs—including mean time to remediate (MTTR), patch compliance rate, and critical vulnerability SLA adherence—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Mean time to remediate and patch velocity metrics

capabilities.name: Upgrade and patch management system
capabilities.description: Centralized upgrade orchestration for network, endpoint, and application assets with automation, quarterly configuration review, and integration with compliance and vulnerability management.
evaluation_focus: Integration with compliance and vulnerability management

capabilities.name: Unified patch management policy
capabilities.description: Formal policies for device, network, and application patching apply enterprise-wide and are reviewed at least quarterly.

capabilities.name: Patch management teams
capabilities.description: Dedicated teams handle device, network, and application upgrades across all relevant assets.

capabilities.name: Upgrade and patch management service logging
capabilities.description: Upgrade and patch activity is formally logged and securely transferred to the SOC, including dynamic changes.

capabilities.name: AI-assisted patch prioritization
capabilities.description: AI or machine learning assists vulnerability triage, patch prioritization, and remediation sequencing to accelerate patch velocity.
evaluation_focus: Remediation sequencing informed by threat context

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
